name: Hearty Wholegrain Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Quaker Oats (Quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
2/3 cup Quaker Oats (Quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the coffee cake batter; mix until just combined.
2. For the topping, mix together all topping ingredients well.
3. Spread half of the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
4. Sprinkle half of the topping over the batter.
5. Top with the remaining batter and continue with the remaining topping.
6. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. For microwave cooking: Cook on HIGH for 6 to 7 minutes, rotating after 3 minutes of cooking, or until the wooden pick comes out clean.
